steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what the passage most directly supports about krill consumption. Locate the specific numbers given for each whale.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Most baleen whales include krill in their diets, but the sei whale is less likely than the bowhead whale to do so.: Wrong. The passage gives sei whales a krill consumption figure. ✗
  • Choice B — Both the sei whale and the bowhead whale can eat as much as 19,800 kg of krill per day.: Wrong. The numbers are different. ✗
  • Choice C — The bowhead whale is able to eat more krill per day than the sei whale is.: Correct. Bowhead: 19,800 kg/day; sei whale maximum: 30% of 25,000 kg = 7,500 kg/day. Bowhead eats far more. ✓
  • Choice D — The quantities of krill consumed by bowhead whales have made it difficult for sei whales to find sufficient food.: Wrong. The passage says nothing about food competition. ✗
That is the correct answer.
